//: Map of NPC internal name -> personalized content. 'Aria' here is the NPC's internal Name (not display name). Every section below is OPTIONAL; delete any you don't want and that system falls back to Marriage Overhaul's generic pool. All text is shown verbatim (no translation) - ship one pack per language if you need localization.

VeryLow: Oh. You're awake. I don't really have anything to say to you.
Morning. ...Just give me some space today, alright?
Low: Morning. I'll be tending the garden if you need me.
Oh, hello. There's tea in the pot. Help yourself.
High: Good morning! The garden's blooming and so is my mood. Funny how you do that.
There you are. I picked the first ripe tomato just for you. Don't tell the others.
VeryHigh: Morning, my love. I lay here listening to the rain and thinking how lucky I am to wake beside you.
Come here before you go. A whole day is easier to face after a kiss from you.

Happy: Good morning! I'm in such a wonderful mood today. The rain, the garden, you - it's perfect.
Morning! I woke up smiling. That's becoming a habit around you.
Neutral: Morning. I'll be out in the beds most of the day. Come find me if you get a chance.
I dreamed about the harvest again. Occupational hazard, I suppose.
Grumpy: Morning. The aphids are back and so is my bad mood. Don't mind me.
...Not my best day. Be patient with me, would you?

Arguments.Intro: You trampled the seedling bed again. I know it's just plants to you, but I've been nursing those for weeks.
Arguments.GoodChoice: You're right, I'll watch my step. Show me where's safe to walk.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...Thank you. That's all I wanted. Here, I'll mark the paths for you.
Arguments.NeutralReply: I know. Accidents still cost me a season's work, though.
Arguments.BadReply: 'Just plants.' That's my whole heart out there. Forget it.

Arguments.Intro: You've been gone from dawn to dusk every day. I didn't marry you to garden alone.
Arguments.GoodChoice: I'll make time for us. Tomorrow, just you and me.
Arguments.GoodReply: I'd like that. More than you know. Don't forget, okay?
Arguments.NeutralChoice: I'm working hard for our future.
Arguments.NeutralReply: Our future. I just want a little of the present, too.
Arguments.BadChoice: Maybe find a hobby to fill the time.
Arguments.BadReply: A hobby. Right. Never mind that I wanted it to be you.

Anniversary.Reminder: My dearest,^Do you know what today is? A whole year since we wed. Meet me in the garden - I have something for you.^- Aria
Anniversary.Sweet: You remembered our anniversary! Of course you did. Best year of my life, and the first of many. I love you.
Anniversary.Disappointed: You forgot our anniversary. ...I waited in the garden all morning. It's fine. I'll be fine.

Lines: So you were giving gifts to someone else today. Should I be worried, or just a little hurt?
I heard you brought them a present. I trust you... I just wish it had been me.

Makeup.Hint: If you really want to make it right, bring me something from the wild. Something that grew.
Makeup.Reconcile: Something straight from the earth. That's exactly you. ...Okay. We're good. Come here.
Makeup.Resigned: The apology never came. That's alright. I've made my peace with it on my own.
